Third-party libraries bundled for offline/air-gapped production use:

1) JSZip 3.10.1
   Source: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js
   License: MIT

2) jsPDF 2.5.1
   Source: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js
   License: MIT

3) jsPDF-AutoTable 3.5.31
   Source: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf-autotable/3.5.31/jspdf.plugin.autotable.min.js
   License: MIT
